title: Health and medicine
explanation:
Health and medicine

  • diagnosis, symptom, chronic, immune, vaccine
  • treatment, prescription, surgery, rehabilitation, epidemic
  • verbs: diagnose, prescribe, recover, prevent

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 1
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The doctor made an accurate ____ after several tests. | *diagnosis | campaign | platform
A persistent cough can be a common ____ of infection. | *symptom | verdict | mandate
Patients with ____ conditions need long-term care. | *chronic | temporary | optional
The ____ programme helped reduce cases dramatically. | *vaccine | screenplay | receipt

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option. Use each option ONLY ONCE.

questions.text: The nurse will ____ antibiotics for the infection. | prescribe
He needed months of ____ after the knee injury. | rehabilitation
Good hygiene can ____ many illnesses. | prevent
She began to ____ quickly after the operation. | recover
The hospital specialises in heart ____. | surgery

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 3
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: The new ____ proved effective in clinical trials. | *treatment | genre | coalition
A strong ____ system helps the body fight disease. | *immune | trade | supply
The region faced a flu ____ last winter. | *epidemic | premiere | merger
You need a ____ to collect the medication. | *prescription | referendum | screenplay
